name: mindease
description: Root dev orchestrator — boots every MindEase service together. See .env.example for the port map.

scripts.setup:python: python3 -m venv ml-service/.venv && ml-service/.venv/bin/pip install -r ml-service/requirements.txt && python3.11 -m venv StudentVerification/.venv && StudentVerification/.venv/bin/pip install -r StudentVerification/requirements.txt && python3.11 -m venv emotion-service/.venv && emotion-service/.venv/bin/pip install -r emotion-service/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,ml,verify,spotify,emotion -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan,red "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd ml-service && .venv/bin/python app.py" "StudentVerification/.venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 --app-dir StudentVerification" "npm run server --prefix Spotify" "cd emotion-service && .venv/bin/python main.py"
